name: Shopstr
compose:
name: slashnode-shopstr
services:
  web:
    image: calvadev/shopstr:v0.7.5
    container_name: shopstr
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PORT: '3000'
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:30402:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
